message.content:
@startuml
participant ConnectInterceptor as C1
participant StreamAllocation as S1
participant RealConnection as R1
participant Http2Connection as H1
participant CallServerInterceptor as C2
participant Http2Codec as H2
participant Http2Writer as H3
participant Sink as S2
participant Socket as S3
participant ReaderRunnable as R2
participant Http2Read as H4
participant Http2Stream as H5
participant Source as S4

C1 ..> S1 : newStream
S1 ..> R1 : connect
R1 ..> H1 : start()
H1 ..> C2 : writeRequestHeaders
C2 ..> H1 : newStream
H1 ..> H3 : synStream
H3 ..> S2 : write
S2 ..> S3 : write
C2 ..> R2 : write
R2 ..> H4 : nextFrame()
H4 ..> H1 : handle
H1 ..> H5 : receiveXXX()
H5 ..> S4 : read()
S4 ..> S3 : read()

@enduml
